caption: The video displays a white screen featuring black text that evolves over time. Initially, the text is fragmented and scattered, appearing as disjointed letters and words such as "Le rn ore ab ut S a b a ha va d. du re e rch dps". As the clip progresses, the characters shift and coalesce into a clear, coherent sentence. The final frames show the completed phrase, "Learn more about DPSI at cyber.law.harvard.edu/research/dpsi", centered on the screen. The background remains a solid, unchanging white throughout the sequence, and there are no people or physical objects visible. The only movement is the animation of the text transitioning from a garbled state to a legible URL and call to action.
